title: ziziphora orontia
intro: Ziziphora orontia, commonly known as dragon's head or orontium, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Ziziphora orontia include its ability to ease congestion, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Ziziphora orontia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
